review_comments:
['I strongly worry how this creates another place where an attribute is parsed. This is the exact thing we want to eliminate with the attribute parsing rework. Is it possible to use `AttributeParser::parse_limited_should_emit` here?', "Thanks for opening the door on resolving things in attributes. I actually want this for other things so it's nice to see happening. There are a lot of names like `AttrConstResolution`, `attr_const_res_map`, `attr_const_resolution` etc being used. I'm worried that if someone wants to extend this to resolve other things (not constants) they'll have to change all those names. Can you choose a more general naming scheme? (let's wait for consensus before making big changes though) For example maybe just drop the `const` part everywhere and change `AttrConstResolution` to ```rust enum AttrResolution { Const(...) } ``` so others can add variants as needed. I can't comment on the name resolution part - I'm not familiar with it. *[View changes since this review](https://triagebot.infra.rust-lang.org/gh-changes-since/rust-lang/rust/154708/8931f23941cf9ec0093f86a81337873b288344c9..be14df8f1a036d33fcfa1afc9ea9d829a2104154)*", 'Some changes occurred in compiler/rustc_attr_parsing cc @jdonszelmann, @JonathanBrouwer Some changes occurred in compiler/rustc_hir/src/attrs cc @jdonszelmann, @JonathanBrouwer', 'r? @jieyouxu rustbot has assigned @jieyouxu. They will have a look at your PR within the next two weeks and either review your PR or reassign to another reviewer. Use `r?` to explicitly pick a reviewer

review:
[
  {
    "type": "Bug",
    "conclusion": "修复了在空尖括号后建议生命周期时产生多余逗号的问题。",
    "description": "在 `MissingLifetimeKind::Comma` 分支中，当需要为缺失的生命周期生成建议字符串时，如果缺失的生命周期位于空的尖括号内（例如 `Foo<>`），新的代码逻辑会避免在建议末尾添加一个多余的逗号。然而，`is_empty_brackets` 的判断逻辑存在潜在问题。`source_map.span_look_ahead(lt.span, \">\", Some(1))` 检查的是从 `lt.span` 的末尾开始，下一个字符是否是 `>`。如果 `lt.span` 恰好指向一个空的尖括号 `<>` 内部，这个检查是有效的。但是，如果 `lt.span` 指向的是其他位置（例如，在 `Foo<T,>` 中，`lt.span` 可能指向 `T` 和 `>` 之间的位置），这个检查可能会产生误判，导致在不应该省略逗号的时候省略了逗号，或者反之。这可能导致编译器给出的建议不正确。",
    "evidence": "let is_empty_brackets = source_map.span_look_ahead(lt.span, \">\", Some(1)).is_some();\nlet sugg = if is_empty_brackets { sugg } else { format!(\"{sugg}, \") };",
    "advice": "建议审查 `span_look_ahead` 的使用场景，并添加更详细的测试用例来覆盖边界情况，例如 `Foo<T,>` 和 `Foo<T, U>` 中缺失生命周期的情况，以确保 `is_empty_brackets` 的判断准确无误。同时，考虑是否需要检查 `lt.span` 之前的内容（例如，前面是否有 `<` 且中间没有其他标记）来更精确地判断是否处于空尖括号内。",
    "confidence": 0.7,
    "severity": "Medium"
  },
  {
    "type": "Readability",
    "conclusion": "改进了迭代器链以生成逗号分隔的生命周期列表。",

[
  {
    "type": "Design",
    "conclusion": "用Lt表替换Cased表，优化Unicode数据表大小",
    "description": "代码变更的主要目的是用更小的Lt（Letter, titlecase）表替换原有的Cased表，从而减少Unicode数据表的总体大小（从9997字节减少到9629字节）。在`char::is_cased`和`char::case`方法中，通过组合调用`Lowercase`、`Uppercase`和`Lt`来替代原有的`Cased`查询。然而，这种替换可能改变了`is_cased`的语义定义。根据Unicode标准，'Cased'属性定义为具有大写、小写或标题大小写映射的字符。虽然`Lowercase || Uppercase || Lt`在逻辑上应该等价于`Cased`，但需要确保Lt表确实只包含标题大小写字符，且没有遗漏任何原本属于Cased但不属于这三类的字符。",
    "evidence": "文件: library/core/src/char/methods.rs\n@@ -810,7 +810,7 @@ impl char {\n         match self {\n             'a'..='z' | 'A'..='Z' => true,\n             '\\0'..='\\u{A9}' => false,\n-            _ => unicode::Cased(self),\n+            _ => unicode::Lowercase(self) || unicode::Uppercase(self) || unicode::Lt(self),\n         }\n     }",
    "advice": "建议添加注释说明这种替换的等价性，并确保有充分的测试覆盖所有Unicode码点，验证`Lowercase || Uppercase || Lt`的结果与原始`Cased`表完全一致。同时，检查Unicode数据生成工具（unicode-table-generator）是否正确生成了Lt表。",

    "conclusion": "重构查询系统，用闭包替换描述函数模块，并新增自定义循环错误处理机制。",
    "description": "代码变更的主要目的是重构查询系统，移除了 `_description_fns` 模块，改为为每个查询生成一个描述闭包。同时，新增了 `handle_cycle_error` 查询修饰符，允许查询定义自定义的循环错误处理函数，从而替代了原有的 `specialize_query_vtables` 特殊化机制。这使得查询的配置（如描述、缓存、循环处理）更加一致地通过修饰符来声明。",
    "evidence": "提交信息明确指出：'This commit removes the `_description_fns` module entirely. For each query we now instead generate a description closure that is used instead.' 以及 'This eliminates the need for `specialize_query_vtables`, which is the current hack to install custom handlers.'",
    "advice": "变更设计合理，增强了代码的一致性和可维护性。建议在后续开发中，确保所有需要自定义循环错误处理的查询都正确添加了 `handle_cycle_error` 修饰符。",

    "description": "在 `parse_query_modifiers` 函数中，局部变量的声明顺序（如 `let mut depth_limit = None;`）与后续结构体 `QueryModifiers` 的字段顺序一致，并使用了 `tidy-alphabetical` 注释来保持整洁。然而，在 `make_modifiers_stream` 函数中，从 `query.modifiers` 解构赋值时，变量的顺序与结构体字段顺序不完全一致，这可能会给阅读和维护带来轻微的困扰。虽然功能不受影响，但保持顺序一致可以提高代码的可读性。",
    "evidence": "在 `make_modifiers_stream` 函数中，解构赋值顺序为：`arena_cache, cache_on_disk, depth_limit, desc, eval_always, feedable, handle_cycle_error, no_force, no_hash, separate_provide_extern,`。而在 `QueryModifiers` 结构体定义中，字段顺序（根据 `tidy-alphabetical` 注释）是：`arena_cache, cache_on_disk, depth_limit, desc, eval_always, feedable, handle_cycle_error, no_force, no_hash, separate_provide_extern`。两者顺序一致，但证据中引用的代码片段显示了解构的顺序，表明开发者已注意此问题并保持了一致。",

commits:
[{'sha': '278536bbcb019d99fd239ec1942783544f9f17b2', 'message': 'Remove the `_description_fns` module.

`rustc_queries` generates a macro and two modules. One of the modules
looks like this:
```
mod _description_fns {
    ...

    #[allow(unused_variables)]
    pub fn hir_module_items<'tcx>(tcx: TyCtxt<'tcx>, key: LocalModDefId) -> String {
	format!("getting HIR module items in `{}`", tcx.def_path_str(key))
    }

    ...
}
```
Members of this module are then used in `TaggedQueryKey::description`.

This commit removes the `_description_fns` module entirely. For each
query we now instead generate a description closure that is used
instead. This closure is passed in the modifiers list.

This change simplifies `rustc_queries` quite a bit. It requires adding
another query modifier, but query modifiers are how other query-specific
details are already passed to the declarative macros, so it's more
consistent.'}, {'sha': '56d9ea6e8659b7a89ecc882d602a1b07585b00f2', 'message': "Add a `handle_cycle_error` query modifier.

This modifier indicates that a query has a custom handler for cycles.
That custom handler must be found at
`rustc_query_impl::handle_cycle_error::$name`.

This eliminates the need for `specialize_query_vtables`, which is the
current hack to install custom handlers. It's more lines of code in
total, but indicating special treatment of a query via a modifier in
`queries.rs` is more consistent with how other aspects of queries are
handled."}, {'sha': '63e44caeceff9cff9180ba58d2eaa109f2402ba9', 'message': 'Use typedefs for key and value types in custom cycle handlers.

This avoids having to copy the type from the query definition.'}]

commits:
[{'sha': '278536bbcb019d99fd239ec1942783544f9f17b2', 'message': 'Remove the `_description_fns` module.

`rustc_queries` generates a macro and two modules. One of the modules
looks like this:
```
mod _description_fns {
    ...

    #[allow(unused_variables)]
    pub fn hir_module_items<'tcx>(tcx: TyCtxt<'tcx>, key: LocalModDefId) -> String {
	format!("getting HIR module items in `{}`", tcx.def_path_str(key))
    }

    ...
}
```
Members of this module are then used in `TaggedQueryKey::description`.

This commit removes the `_description_fns` module entirely. For each
query we now instead generate a description closure that is used
instead. This closure is passed in the modifiers list.

This change simplifies `rustc_queries` quite a bit. It requires adding
another query modifier, but query modifiers are how other query-specific
details are already passed to the declarative macros, so it's more
consistent.'}, {'sha': '56d9ea6e8659b7a89ecc882d602a1b07585b00f2', 'message': "Add a `handle_cycle_error` query modifier.

This modifier indicates that a query has a custom handler for cycles.
That custom handler must be found at
`rustc_query_impl::handle_cycle_error::$name`.

This eliminates the need for `specialize_query_vtables`, which is the
current hack to install custom handlers. It's more lines of code in
total, but indicating special treatment of a query via a modifier in
`queries.rs` is more consistent with how other aspects of queries are
handled."}, {'sha': '63e44caeceff9cff9180ba58d2eaa109f2402ba9', 'message': 'Use typedefs for key and value types in custom cycle handlers.

This avoids having to copy the type from the query definition.'}]

review:
[
  {
    "type": "Bug",
    "conclusion": "修复搜索中外部crate的链接指向错误问题。",
    "description": "代码变更的主要目的是修复 rustdoc 搜索功能中，当外部 crate 被重命名时，搜索结果中的链接指向错误的问题。具体来说，之前对于重命名的外部 crate（例如 `extern crate std as st2`），搜索结果中的链接会指向本地文档路径（如 `../st2/index.html`），而不是指向正确的远程文档 URL（如 `https://doc.rust-lang.org/std/`）。变更通过在构建搜索索引时，为 `ExternCrate` 类型的条目添加一个特殊的 URL 字段（`associated_item_disambiguator_or_extern_crate_url`），并在前端 JavaScript 中根据此字段生成正确的链接，从而解决了这个问题。",
    "evidence": "在 `src/librustdoc/html/render/search_index.rs` 中，新增了条件判断：`} else if item.ty == ItemType::ExternCrate ...`，并为外部 crate 设置了 `Some(format!(\"{}{}\", url, tcx.crate_name(cnum).as_str()))` 作为 `associated_item_disambiguator_or_extern_crate_url` 的值。在 `src/librustdoc/html/static/js/search.js` 中，修改了 `externcrate` 类型的链接生成逻辑：`if (item.entry && item.entry.associatedItemDisambiguatorOrExternCrateUrl) { base = item.entry.associatedItemDisambiguatorOrExternCrateUrl; }`。",
    "advice": "代码变更逻辑清晰，修复了已知问题。建议确保新增的字段名 `associated_item_disambiguator_or_extern_crate_url` 在序列化/反序列化过程中保持一致，并且前端 TypeScript 定义也已同步更新（`src/librustdoc/html/static/js/rustdoc.d.ts` 中已更新）。",
    "confidence": 1,
    "severity": "High"
  },
  {
    "type": "Readability",
    "conclusion": "字段名变更意图明确，但可读性稍差。",
    "description": "将 `associated_item_disambiguator` 字段重命名为 `associated_item_disambiguator_or_extern_crate_url`，以反映其现在也用于存储外部 crate 的 URL。这个新名字虽然准确描述了其双重用途，但非常冗长，降低了代码的可读性。在多个地方（结构体定义、序列化、反序列化、模式匹配）都需要使用这个长名字。",
    "evidence": "在 `src/librustdoc/html/render/search_index.rs` 中：`associated_item_disambiguator_or_extern_crate_url: Option<String>,` 和 `if let Some(disambig) = &self.associated_item_disambiguator_or_extern_crate_url {`。",
    "advice": "可以考虑使用一个更简洁但仍有描述性的名字，例如 `disambiguator_or_url`。或者，如果这两个用途在逻辑上差异较大，未来可以考虑将其拆分为两个独立的可选字段。不过，考虑到这是为了修复一个具体问题而进行的扩展，且变更范围有限，当前命名在可接受范围内。",
    "confidence": 0.8,
    "severity": "Low"
  },
  {
    "type": "Design",
    "conclusion": "测试工具增加了对发布频道路径的规范化处理。",
    "description": "在 `src/tools/rustdoc-js/tester.js` 中，新增了 `CHANNEL_REGEX` 正则表达式，并在处理 `href` 键值时，将实际输出和期望输出中的具体版本路径（如 `/nightly/`）替换为占位符 `/$CHANNEL/`。这使得测试用例可以独立于具体的 Rust 发布频道（nightly, beta, stable）运行，提高了测试的健壮性和可维护性。",
    "evidence": "新增代码：`const CHANNEL_REGEX = new RegExp(\"/nightly/|/beta/|/stable/|/1\\\\.[0-9]+\\\\.[0-9]+/\");` 以及在 `valueMapper` 和 `lookForEntry` 函数中对 `href` 值的替换：`value = value.replace(CHANNEL_REGEX, \"/$CHANNEL/\");`。",
    "advice": "这是一个很好的改进。确保正则表达式能够覆盖所有可能的稳定版本格式（例如 `1.75.0`）。当前的正则 `1\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+` 看起来是合理的。",
    "confidence": 1,
    "severity": "Low"
  }
]
